name: superagent-monorepo
description: SuperAgent — open-source autonomous AI agent for coding, browser automation, and multimodal media generation (Desktop + Web).
author: SuperAgent Contributors

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@superagent/core && npm run build --workspace=@superagent/cli && npm run build --workspace=@superagent/desktop && npm run build --workspace=@superagent/web
scripts.test: npm test --workspace=@superagent/core && npm test --workspace=@superagent/cli && npm test --workspace=@superagent/desktop && npm test --workspace=@superagent/web
